title: Agents
body:
This resourcepack adds cute cowboy hats to chickens. I'ts that simple!

WARNING: this resourcepack requires some form of CEM for example mods like [Optifine(Forge)](https://optifine.net/home) or [Entity Model Features(fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)



Texturepack przyzywający do życia Kurczaków Agentów! z seri Survival [zio](https://www.youtube.com/@zio) i [Agu](https://www.youtube.com/@Agus6w)

Wymagany [Optifine(Forge)](https://optifine.net/home) lub [Entity Model Features(fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
